Wirtschaftswunder.description: Gain $15M. Ignite an economic miracle through aggressive industrial investment.

Autarky.description: +10% money production. Pursue economic self-sufficiency to free the nation from foreign dependence.

Synthetic Fuel.description: Gain $10M. Build 1 factory. Develop synthetic fuel production to overcome petroleum shortages.

Ersatz Materials.description: Build 2 factories. +5% build speed. Manufacture substitute materials for scarce strategic resources.

Mefo Bills.description: Gain $20M. Issue secret promissory notes to finance rearmament off the books.

Reichsmark Stabilization.description: +5 base stability. +5% money production. Stabilize the currency and restore confidence in the financial system.

Industrial Expansion.description: Build 2 factories. Rapidly expand heavy industry with state-directed investment.

Total War Economy.description: Build 3 factories. +15% money production. Subordinate every aspect of the economy to the demands of total war.

Reichsautobahn.description: +10% transport speed. Gain $5M. Build a national highway network for rapid military and civilian transport.

Infrastructure Program.description: Build 1 factory. +10% build speed. Invest heavily in bridges, ports, and public infrastructure.

Rail Network.description: +10% transport speed. Build 1 factory. Modernize the rail system for efficient troop and supply movement.

Political Consolidation.description: +50 political power. Consolidate political authority under a single vision for the nation.

Gleichschaltung.description: +10% political power gain. +5 base stability. Align all institutions of state and society under centralized control.

Propaganda Ministry.description: +10 base stability. +50 political power. Establish a ministry devoted to controlling public opinion and media.

Greater Reich.description: +10% attack. Shift 20% right. Pursue the vision of uniting all Germanic peoples under one state.

Anschluss.description: Build 2 factories. Gain $10M. Annex Austria into the Reich to create a larger, unified German state.

Sudetenland.description: Build 1 factory. +5 base stability. Demand the cession of Czechoslovak border regions inhabited by ethnic Germans.

Danzig or War.description: +10% attack. Train 2 divisions. Issue an ultimatum for the return of Danzig and the Polish Corridor.

Lebensraum.description: +15% attack. Gain $20M. Build 2 factories. Seize living space in the East through conquest and colonization.

Democratic Germany.description: +15 base stability. Shift 20% left. Reject totalitarianism and restore democratic governance to Germany.

Free Elections.description: +10 base stability. Shift 15% libertarian. Hold free and fair elections to establish a legitimate government.

Parliamentary Reform.description: +15% political power gain. +10 base stability. Strengthen the parliament as the supreme organ of democratic governance.

European Cooperation.description: +15 base stability. Gain $20M. +10% political power gain. Lead the way toward a united, peaceful Europe built on shared prosperity.

Concordat.description: +5 base stability. Sign a concordat with the Vatican to regulate church-state relations.

Church Relations.description: +5 base stability. +25 political power. Manage the complex relationship between the state and religious institutions.

Cultural Policy.description: +10 base stability. +5% political power gain. Shape national culture to reinforce the regime's ideological vision.

Wehrmacht Expansion.description: Gain $10M. Train 1 division. Begin the rapid expansion and modernization of the armed forces.

Heer Modernization.description: +10% attack. +5% defense. Modernize the German Army with new equipment and doctrine.

Panzer Divisions.description: +15% attack. Train 2 divisions. Organize dedicated armored divisions built around the Panzer concept.

Blitzkrieg Doctrine.description: +20% attack. +15% transport speed. Perfect the art of lightning warfare: speed, shock, and combined arms.

Kriegsmarine.description: Gain $10M. +5% defense. Rebuild the German Navy into a force capable of challenging the Royal Navy.

Atlantic U-Boats.description: +10% attack. Gain $5M. Deploy submarine wolfpacks to strangle enemy supply lines in the Atlantic.

Surface Raiders.description: +10% attack. +5% defense. Send commerce raiders to disrupt enemy shipping across the oceans.

Bismarck Program.description: +15% attack. +10% defense. Gain $10M. Commission super-heavy battleships to dominate the seas.

Luftwaffe.description: +5% attack. Gain $5M. Establish the Luftwaffe as an independent branch of the armed forces.

Fighter Production.description: +10% defense. Build 1 factory. Ramp up production of single-engine fighters to contest the skies.

Bomber Production.description: +10% attack. Build 1 factory. Build a fleet of medium and heavy bombers for strategic and tactical use.

Jet Development.description: +15% attack. +10% defense. Pioneer jet-powered aircraft to leap a generation ahead in air warfare.

West Wall.description: +15% defense. Construct a massive defensive line along the western frontier.

Atlantic Wall.description: +15% defense. Build 1 factory. Fortify the entire Atlantic coastline against amphibious invasion.

Fortress Europe.description: +20% defense. +10 base stability. Transform occupied Europe into an impregnable continental fortress.

Wunderwaffen.description: Lose $15M. Pour resources into wonder weapons that could turn the tide of war.

V-Weapons.description: +10% attack. Deploy V-1 and V-2 vengeance weapons to terrorize enemy cities.

Jet Fighters.description: +10% attack. +10% defense. Field the world's first operational jet fighters in combat.

Advanced Rocketry.description: +20% attack. +10% defense. Develop advanced rocket technology with devastating military applications.

Anti-Comintern Pact.description: +50 political power. +5 base stability. Form an international front against the spread of communism.

Axis Alliance.description: +5% attack. Unlocks faction creation. Forge the Axis alliance to unite the revisionist powers.

Military Cooperation.description: +10% attack. +5% defense. Coordinate military planning and operations among Axis partners.

Steel Pact.description: +10% attack. Gain $10M. Unlocks expanded faction invitations. Sign a pact of steel binding the Axis to mutual defense.

Ribbentrop Diplomacy.description: +50 political power. Pursue aggressive diplomacy to reshape the European order.

Molotov-Ribbentrop.description: +10 base stability. Gain $10M. Sign a non-aggression pact with the Soviet Union and secretly divide Eastern Europe.

Divide Eastern Europe.description: +10% attack. +50 political power. Enforce the secret protocols and partition Eastern Europe with Moscow.

Rhineland Remilitarization.description: +10 base stability. +5% attack. March troops back into the demilitarized Rhineland in defiance of Versailles.

Rearmament.description: +1 military size. Train 2 divisions. Openly rearm in violation of treaty limitations.

Military Sovereignty.description: +15% attack. +10 base stability. Reclaim full military sovereignty and cast off the shackles of Versailles.

Colonial Ambitions.description: +50 political power. Gain $5M. Revive dreams of a German colonial empire beyond Europe.

Mittelafrika Claims.description: Gain $10M. +25 political power. Demand the return of lost African colonies and press for a unified Mittelafrika.

Naval Projection.description: +10% attack. +5% defense. Gain $10M. Build a blue-water navy capable of projecting German power across the globe.
